summary: Tested all 4 new features: Supported Currencies module, FX Currency conversion in partner plan, Plan Visibility Rules, and Tenant partner_type/industry/tags fields. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified with Playwright. Found and fixed 1 critical bug in Edit Org Details dialog (SelectItem empty string value crash). Partner user 'admin@ligerinc.local' was created as it didn't exist in DB.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value `value=""` caused Radix UI runtime error: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'. Dialog crashed on open for any tenant without partner_type/industry set.
ui_bugs.status: FIXED by T1 - changed value="" to value="__none__" in both Partner Type and Industry SelectItems

design_issues.screen: Admin Tables (Partner Orders, Subscriptions, Plans tables)
issues: Pre-existing React hydration warnings: <span> inside <tbody>, <tr> inside <span> inside <tbody> - invalid HTML nesting (not new in this iteration)

action_items: Review and fix pre-existing HTML nesting issue: <span> wrapper inside <tbody> in table components (Admin/PartnerOrdersTab/PartnerSubscriptionsTab/PlansTab) - React hydration warnings
critical_code_review_comments: TenantsTab.tsx: SelectItem empty string value issue was caught and FIXED - ensure same pattern not used elsewhere in app
useSupportedCurrencies.ts: Good implementation with cache and fallback to defaults on error
PlanBillingTab.tsx: Upgrade Plan button only renders when upgrades.length > 0, Buy Extra Limits only when rates.length > 0 - correct conditional rendering
FX conversion in plan_management.py: Plans correctly show display_price/display_currency in partner's base_currency
seed_data_creation: Created partner org 'Liger Inc' with admin user 'admin@ligerinc.local' (ChangeMe123!) as it didn't exist in the DB for testing partner plan & billing features. Partner code: liger-inc, base_currency: USD.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested and working: (1) Supported Currencies tab visible in platform_super_admin sidebar at /admin?tab=currencies with add/remove working; (2) FX currency conversion in /api/partner/my-plan returns display_price in base_currency; (3) Plan visibility rules builder UI works in Plans edit modal when is_public is unchecked; (4) Tenant Edit Org Details dialog now shows partner_type/industry/tags (fixed SelectItem crash). Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter162_currencies_visibility_plans.py (21 tests, all pass). Partner credentials: admin@ligerinc.local / ChangeMe123! (code: liger-inc). Note that data-testids for Plan&Billing buttons are 'open-upgrade-plan-btn' and 'open-one-time-modal-btn' (not 'upgrade-plan-btn'/'buy-extra-limits-btn').
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: In TenantsTab.tsx Edit Org Details dialog, the Partner Type and Industry Select components used `<SelectItem value=''>` for the 'Not set' option. Radix UI Select component explicitly disallows empty string as SelectItem value (since empty string is used internally to clear the selection/show placeholder). When the edit dialog opened for a tenant with no partner_type/industry set (default empty string ''), the Select tried to find matching SelectItem with value='' and threw: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'. Fix: Changed value='' to value='__none__' and mapped '__none__' back to '' in the onValueChange handler. The same fix was applied to both Partner Type and Industry selects.
